content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma +2.09%, Auto +0.84%, PSU Bank +0.95% and BankNifty +0.58% leading. VIX compressing -2.85% to 17.40, global cues strong (Nasdaq +1.03%). Book is well-deployed at 65% with multiple winners; focus is on trailing SLs and disciplined position management rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4% with strong fundamentals (Q4 PAT +19%, sub-1% GNPA, ICICI Sec TP 1350). Trail SL from 1025.86 to 1030 — modest tighten but maintains >1.6% buffer below CMP 1047 (within 1% trail-gap floor). Target intact at 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.9% with SL 119 still ~4% below CMP. Gold recovering today +1.47%; defensive hedge value intact. SL adequately spaced; no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7% but at 52-week high (1748). SL at 1710 already at breakeven+. Holding through promoter stake-sale digestion; Capital Group anchor positive. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — current SL already at entry, leaving as-is. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1% but SL at 206 just below CMP 207.24 — already tight. Q4 PAT +68%, CLSA TP 220. Stock consolidating after +41% one-month rally; let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%; CMP 4652, SL already at 4595 (entry+20). Defence cluster strong (GRSE +9%). SL 4595 is ~1.2% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. No change needed; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1% on stellar Q4 (PAT +114%, EBITDA margin 34.3%). SL at 6950 already at entry+50. CMP 7045, gap to SL ~1.4% — within trail-gap floor. Geojit TP 8500. No change required; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.3% after gap-up; SL 825 (~1.6% below CMP 838). Jefferies BUY TP 810 already pierced. Naval Systems Rs 610 cr expansion catalyst. Let position breathe."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.3% but day +6.55% with 2.4x volume. SL 358 ~3% below CMP — adequate. Q4 PAT +30%, MOSL TP 325. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%; SL 812 ~1.1% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT +18%, India volume growth 9% best-in-class. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0% but SL 3245 only ~1% below CMP — well-defined risk. Q4 PAT +48.5%, dividend Rs 33. Still top Nifty gainer today; let SL handle the trade."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.2% post Q4 gap-up. Trail SL from 1259 (entry breakeven) up to 1265 — small tighten but still ~1.7% below CMP 1286, respecting trail-gap floor. Cigniti record date May 16 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. SL 2900 ~4.2% below CMP 3028 — wider than ideal but Q4 PAT +24%, L1 in Rs 33,000 cr corvette tender. Let initial setup play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY at LIMIT 133.50 placed 447 minutes ago. CMP 136.75 is well above the limit — order will not fill at this level. Per ORDER HYGIENE, do NOT stack another BUY. Letting existing limit sit; if it doesn't fill by 2:30 PM it expires naturally. Stock extended +8.5% today, chasing higher would be poor R:R."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 806.00,
      "stop_loss": 780.00,
      "target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record print: revenue +11%, PAT +11%, EBITDA margin 46.5% all-time high; ~68% MF AUM share. Gap-up +10.28% holding well above VWAP 801. Entry 806, SL 780 (-3.2%), target 855 (+6.1%). R:R = 49/26 = 1.88. Position size ~Rs 20,150 = 2% of capital; risk budget 2% × 3.2% = 0.064% of portfolio — well within 0.5% per-name cap. Diversifies into financial-infra; not in held-stock cluster."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1030.00, "reasoning": "Trail SL up modestly while keeping 1.6% buffer below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL adequately spaced."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at entry+10; promoter sale absorbed by Capital Group buyer."},
    {"symbol": "BANDHANBNK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at 206 already tight; Q4 turnaround intact."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at entry+20; defence sector strong; Q4 results May 14."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at entry+50; Q4 stellar; holding for Geojit TP 8500."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Recent gap-up; let position consolidate at SL 825."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strong intraday move; Q4 PAT +30%; SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG defensive bid; SL at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "M&M", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +48.5%, top Nifty gainer; SL handles the risk."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1265.00, "reasoning": "Modest trail up while preserving 1.7% gap below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Just entered; let initial SL frame the trade."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VEDL trades ex-demerger — price discovery messy until June listings; avoid until cleaner. WOCKPHARMA +22% too extended to chase. M&M Q4 already in book. SRF, AUROPHARMA, CHOLAHLDNG all interesting but adding more to a fully-deployed book without trimming is undisciplined. CAMS picked because (a) clean financial-infra play (no sector overlap with held NBFCs/HFCs), (b) Q4 catalyst fresh, (c) sub-1% deployed-cash impact.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 65% deployed, 12 names, well-diversified across Financials/HFC/NBFC, Defence (HAL+GRSE - watch cluster), Auto, FMCG, Chemicals, IT, Ports, ETF. Defence cluster (HAL+GRSE) is at ~1.0% capital combined — within limits but no further additions. Today's session has multiple position-day-1 entries already filled overnight; priority is letting them work and trailing winners. CAMS is the one new entry — high-quality earnings beat, fresh sector. Daily P&L +0.42% reflects healthy book. Daily loss budget intact at full Rs 75,452."
}
